title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!
